display_text: Queen of Pain Aghanim's Scepter: Shadow Strike becomes an AoE spell and triggers Scream of Pain when it ends or is reapplied. This upgrade counters grouped enemy formations by punishing clumped-up heroes, transforming Queen of Pain into a sustained AoE damage threat in teamfights.
search_text: Queen of Pain Aghanim Scepter AoE damage anti-grouping teamfight sustain damage

display_text: Queen of Pain Aghanim's Shard: Blink releases a sonic boom that damages and silences enemies at both start and end locations. This upgrade counters spell-reliant enemies by disrupting their ability to retaliate, enabling safer initiations and escapes while adding utility to Queen of Pain's mobility.
search_text: Queen of Pain Aghanim Shard silence anti-caster blink initiation escape utility
